synopsis: For years, Saint Evelyn has protected her country with her powerful healing magic, earning her the love of the people. But then, the first prince breaks off their engagement and strips her of her title, only to name her incompetent half sister as the new saint. Cast out from the only life she's ever known, Evelyn is forced to find her place in a world that suddenly feels all too vast. Fate smiles upon her when she stumbles upon a young boy from the streets who shows her a new path: making a living with her healing magic. The next thing she knows, she's earned her first commission—and a handsome count is proposing to her?! With discontent growing in the royal family over the prince's folly and adoring fans flocking to her side, Evelyn must navigate political intrigue, newly realized fame, and unexpected romance in the air. Now if only she would realize just how much everyone adores her! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Robou no Fujii: Idai Naru Bonjin kara no Tayori
titleRomaji: Robou no Fujii: Idai Naru Bonjin kara no Tayori
titleNative: 路傍のフジイ〜偉大なる凡人からの便り〜
synopsis: Is he an eccentric or a sage? Does the seemingly unremarkable salaryman, Fujii, redefine the definition of "happiness?" In the workplace, he's a plain middle-aged man who doesn't stand out. While he does his job competently, he's not one to waste words. Come quitting time, he disappears like a ghost. He's not the type to be invited to after-work drinks in the first place. More like, he's the guy who's thought of as "I wouldn't want to end up like that..." by his juniors. Yet, he piques the curiosity of others... "I wonder how he was raised?" "Does he have friends or a girlfriend?" "What does he do on weekends?" Suddenly, you realize you've become captivated by Fujii... An elusive emotion that's hard to put into words is vividly captured by the author of Reborn no Kishi in this bewitching life drama! (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: Seinaru Kishi no Ankokudou
synopsis: Young Sain Forth has it made; as the famed Holy Knight, he has the people’s love, the respect of kings, and the blessings of a literal goddess. His aspirations lie elsewhere, though. With his assistant Melia at his side, he leaves for an academy in a foreign kingdom, where he is treated as a deviant by his peers. It’s his own fault, mind you—his stubborn insistance on wearing a custom, all-black uniform makes him stick out. He isn’t the only outcast in his class: Alicia, born into the Clan of Light but unable to use anything but fire magic, faces similar struggles, and the two quickly become allies. Alicia proposes that they enter the labyrinth below the school in search of a holy sword, but Sain has other plans in mind: a doom sword. And so, with his friends in tow, Sain ventures into the perilous unknown, driven by a wish to become the coolest, edgiest, most awesome thing in existence: a Dark Knight. There’s just one problem. He can’t use dark magic. Like, at all. (Source: J-Novel Club)

synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: LORD
synopsis: The story is set in the period from the end of the Later Han Dynasty to the Three Kingdoms Period in China. In 184 AD, a brave general of the Nanukoku Kingdom, who contributed to Himiko's unification of Japan, decides to take over the "hegemony" of the Later Han Dynasty. He travels alone to Yushu in the Later Han Dynasty, where he meets the three brothers Liu Bei, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei. He works with these three brothers, but soon learns that Liu Bei is an evil person. One day, Liu Bei tries to kill a criminal to test his new sword, but Pei Yu stops him and even cuts off Liu Bei's head. Guan Yu and Zhang Fei are outraged, but Pei Yu sees and points out that the two were not following Liu Bei out of pure heart. Afterwards, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei witnessed Puo Yu's actions and thoughts and decided to make Puo Yu the new Liu Bei, and the three of them took a new oath of brotherhood in Taoyuan. Note: The story is loosely based on the Three Kingdoms period, using both real and original characters and events from the historical period in Chinese history and folklore of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms.

It just so happens to be the home of the most beautiful girl in school! Perfect, pretty, and popular, Momogusa-san is amazing at everything she does and now Hataki will have a chance to see her in her element. But, he quickly learns something shocking: Momogusa is incredibly lazy at home! The moment she’s home from school, she seems to transform into a totally different version of herself and even expects to be pampered! Somehow she grows fond of Hataki and even begins to let him pamper her. Could this be the start of some sort of relationship or is Hataki just a glorified manservant? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleNative: 異世界美少女受肉おじさんと
synonyms: เกิดใหม่ต่างโลก เพื่อนผมน่ารักโฮกเลยครับ
synopsis: Tachibana Hinata and Jinguji Tsukasa are two young men who have been friends since childhood. After a disaster of a singles mixer, they’re sent flying into another world by a mysterious being–and now Tachibana is a beautiful blonde girl! When Jinguji angrily demands that they be returned home and go back to normal, they get cursed, and the only way out is for them to go on a quest and defeat the demon king. But…now the two friends can’t stop thinking about how hot the other is. Will they save the world before their lifelong bromance becomes a romance? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment) Note: Ranked 19th place of Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Web Manga Category.

synonyms: The Deeds of an Extremely Arrogant Villainous Noble
synopsis: Luke Witharia Gilbert was destined to be the arrogant villain of a fantasy tale, but he was undone by his own pride and easily defeated by the hero. But when he’s reborn with full knowledge of how the story ends, Luke decides to take his fate into his own hands. Determined to survive this time, he sets aside his hubris and dedicates himself to training in earnest. His efforts shake the future in unexpected ways—quickly enlisting his sword instructor and even captivating a brilliant young lady from a noble family. In this version of the story, the bad guy might just come out on top! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

synopsis: Ru-Min is an acting prodigy with a Newtube channel that often goes viral. As it happens, she is also the spitting image of her favorite A-list actor Ha-Jin Jeong. A shocking turn of events reveals that Ha-Jin is actually Ru-Min’s biological father. The cold-hearted actor reluctantly takes her in, but pointedly vows no affection. However, as Ru-Min’s raw talent shines, Ha-Jin finds himself becoming an unlikely mentor. Having long fantasized about Ha-Jin being her father, can Ru-Min finally make her dreams a reality? (Source: WEBTOON)

synopsis: Ex, an E-rank adventurer, makes a decision one day after five years of slaving away at the guild. "I'm quitting this job!" "I'm neeeever gonna work anymore!" (Source: Manga UP!)
